languages.text: {n}Сержант стоит, вальяжно покачиваясь, с деланно расслабленным видом. Яруб незаметно поглядывает то в одну, то в другую сторону, слегка поворачивая голову.{/n} "Готов приступить, как только все случится, Ваше Благородие. С минуты на минуту жду".
languages.translation_comment:
Не играет DL_JarubStoleSword, играет DL_JarubToHQ:
* ИЛИ DL_Stage_0
* ИЛИ DL_SeberianDropSword

Не играет DL_JarubStoleSword, играет DL_JarubToHQ:
* ИЛИ DL_Stage_0
* ИЛИ DL_SeberianDropSword

languages.text: {n}The sergeant stands, swaying slightly with a deliberate air of nonchalance. Jarub casts a furtive look first one way, then the other, with the barest turn of his head.{/n} "I'm ready to move as soon as it happens, my {mf|lord|lady}. Any minute now."
languages.original_text: {n}Сержант стоит, вальяжно покачиваясь, с деланно расслабленным видом. Яруб незаметно поглядывает то в одну, то в другую сторону, слегка поворачивая голову.{/n} "Готов приступить, как только все случится, Ваше Благородие. С минуты на минуту жду".

traits.locale_text: {n}The sergeant stands, swaying slightly with a deliberate air of nonchalance. Jarub casts a furtive look first one way, then the other, with the barest turn of his head.{/n} "I'm ready to move as soon as it happens, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}. Any minute now."

{n}The sergeant stands, swaying slightly with a deliberate air of nonchalance. Jarub casts a furtive look first one way, then the other, with the barest turn of his head.{/n} "I'm ready to move as soon as it happens, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}. Any minute now."

{n}The sergeant stands, swaying slightly with a deliberate air of nonchalance. Jarub casts a furtive look first one way, then the other, with the barest turn of his head.{/n} "I'm ready to move as soon as it happens, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}. Any minute now."

languages.text: {n}El sargento se pone en pie y se inclina hacia los lados con un aire deliberado de indiferencia. Jarub mira furtivamente a un lado y después al otro sin apenas mover la cabeza.{/n} «Estoy listo para entrar en acción en cuanto ocurra, mi{mf|lord|lady}. En cualquier momento».
languages.original_text: {n}The sergeant stands, swaying slightly with a deliberate air of nonchalance. Jarub casts a furtive look first one way, then the other, with the barest turn of his head.{/n} "I'm ready to move as soon as it happens, my {mf|lord|lady}. Any minute now."

traits.locale_text: {n}El sargento se pone en pie y se inclina hacia los lados con un aire deliberado de indiferencia. Jarub mira furtivamente a un lado y después al otro sin apenas mover la cabeza.{/n} «Estoy listo para entrar en acción en cuanto ocurra, mi{mf|lord|lady}. En cualquier momento».

languages.text: {n}军士站着，故意装出漫不经心的样子，微微摇晃着身子。雅鲁布鬼鬼祟祟地东看看西看看，脑袋只微微转动。{/n}“只要时机一到，我随时行动，大人。随时都行。”
languages.original_text: {n}The sergeant stands, swaying slightly with a deliberate air of nonchalance. Jarub casts a furtive look first one way, then the other, with the barest turn of his head.{/n} "I'm ready to move as soon as it happens, my {mf|lord|lady}. Any minute now."

traits.locale_text: {n}军士站着，故意装出漫不经心的样子，微微摇晃着身子。雅鲁布鬼鬼祟祟地东看看西看看，脑袋只微微转动。{/n}“只要时机一到，我随时行动，大人。随时都行。”

languages.text: {n}Devant vous, le sergent se balance légèrement d'un pied sur l'autre avec une nonchalance étudiée. Il jette un regard furtif d'un côté, puis de l'autre, en tournant à peine la tête.{/n} « Je me tiens prêt à passer à l'action dès que possible, {mf|mon seigneur|ma dame}. Ça devrait plus tarder. »
languages.original_text: {n}The sergeant stands, swaying slightly with a deliberate air of nonchalance. Jarub casts a furtive look first one way, then the other, with the barest turn of his head.{/n} "I'm ready to move as soon as it happens, my {mf|lord|lady}. Any minute now."

traits.locale_text: {n}Devant vous, le sergent se balance légèrement d'un pied sur l'autre avec une nonchalance étudiée. Il jette un regard furtif d'un côté, puis de l'autre, en tournant à peine la tête.{/n} « Je me tiens prêt à passer à l'action dès que possible, {mf|mon seigneur|ma dame}. Ça devrait plus tarder. »

languages.text: {n}Çavuş ayakta duruyor, kasten takındığı bir umursamazlık havasıyla hafifçe sallanıyor. Jarub, başını zar zor çevirerek önce bir yana, sonra diğerine kaçamak bir bakış atıyor.{/n} "Olduğu an harekete geçmeye hazırım {mf|lordum|leydim}. Eli kulağındadır."
languages.original_text: {n}The sergeant stands, swaying slightly with a deliberate air of nonchalance. Jarub casts a furtive look first one way, then the other, with the barest turn of his head.{/n} "I'm ready to move as soon as it happens, my {mf|lord|lady}. Any minute now."

traits.locale_text: {n}Çavuş ayakta duruyor, kasten takındığı bir umursamazlık havasıyla hafifçe sallanıyor. Jarub, başını zar zor çevirerek önce bir yana, sonra diğerine kaçamak bir bakış atıyor.{/n} "Olduğu an harekete geçmeye hazırım {mf|lordum|leydim}. Eli kulağındadır."

languages.text: {n}Der Sergeant steht leicht federnd vor dir und gibt sich betont entspannt. Ohne den Kopf merklich zu bewegen, wirft Jarub einen verstohlenen Blick nach links und rechts.{/n} "Ich bin marschbereit, wenn es so weit ist, {mf|Mylord|Mylady}. Jederzeit."
languages.original_text: {n}The sergeant stands, swaying slightly with a deliberate air of nonchalance. Jarub casts a furtive look first one way, then the other, with the barest turn of his head.{/n} "I'm ready to move as soon as it happens, my {mf|lord|lady}. Any minute now."

traits.locale_text: {n}Der Sergeant steht leicht federnd vor dir und gibt sich betont entspannt. Ohne den Kopf merklich zu bewegen, wirft Jarub einen verstohlenen Blick nach links und rechts.{/n} "Ich bin marschbereit, wenn es so weit ist, {mf|Mylord|Mylady}. Jederzeit."

languages.text: {n}軍曹は、少し揺れながら、意図的に気楽な態度で立っている。ジャラブは、首をわずかに傾けて、まず片方、次に他方を見つめる。{/n}「起こった瞬間に動ける準備はできている、お{mf|主|女}様。もうすぐです。」
languages.original_text: {n}The sergeant stands, swaying slightly with a deliberate air of nonchalance. Jarub casts a furtive look first one way, then the other, with the barest turn of his head.{/n} "I'm ready to move as soon as it happens, my {mf|lord|lady}. Any minute now."

traits.locale_text: {n}軍曹は、少し揺れながら、意図的に気楽な態度で立っている。ジャラブは、首をわずかに傾けて、まず片方、次に他方を見つめる。{/n}「起こった瞬間に動ける準備はできている、お{mf|主|女}様。もうすぐです。」
